chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1429 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of cases 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.193/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.579/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of CMA No.192/2023 (1 Rule 10) 5. For hearing of CMA No.194/2023 (1 Rule 10) 6. For hearing of CMA No.580/2023 (1 Rule 10) 7. For hearing of CMA No.5541/2022 (151 CPC) 8. For hearing of main case 03-10-2023 Syed Israr Ali Shah, Advocate for Applicant / Intervenor Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistnat A.G. <><><><>..<><><><> Learned Law Officers submit that this petition has become infructuous as the fresh delimitation of the constituencies has been carried out and the notification has been issued. Mr. Ali Murad Malano, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Barrister Mohsin Shahwani, learned counsel for the petitioner has refused to argue this petition. Therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge Ahmad
